paperTitle: ContextVLA: Vision-Language-Action Model with Amortized Multi-Frame Context

benchmarks.label: LIBERO
benchmarks.detail: Suites: libero spatial 96.6 · libero object 96.6 · libero goal 95.2 · libero 10 85.2 | Table 1 | Notes: All 4 standard suites. pi0-FAST fine-tuned by this paper.

benchmarks.label: SimplerEnv
benchmarks.detail: Suites: widowx vm 59 | Tasks: spoon on towel vm 59 · carrot on plate vm 79 · stack cube vm 65 · put eggplant in basket vm 33 | Table 2 | Notes: WidowX VM only. Score is a reproduction by the citing paper.
